long_description:
On December 10 2025 at 6h25 local time (EST GMT-5) an alert was found on mon04.sr03.rk21.slh

We processed to bring back the breaker to an optimal state by doing the following
1-Disconnected the cable on the affected outlet. 06h27
2-Reseting the breaker 06h29
3-connected each power cable 1 at a time with power reading review. 06h31
4-reaching outlet 29 we did not see any power increase and an investigation pointed out to the PS1 of switch mtor21.2.vpc.sr03.mon04 06h36

Manager was informed before and after the recovery
short_description: Local Power Component Event on mon04.sr03.rk21.slh - SL018TD1 (breaker tripped)
close_notes: PWR - RPP breaker tripped with cause undetermined
